{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323205642A2760D454171619DAAD6"}"},"total":798},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7543275572141343512","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"总体来说是本不错的很纯正的四合院文。
整体是围绕家长里短来写的，也没脱离四合院，喜欢日常向的值得一看。大体上逻辑清晰，偶尔有小的瑕疵，瑕不掩瑜。
扣掉的一星是因为整体节奏略有些拖沓，不过日常文一般都有这种情况。还有就是在对待众禽的态度上不是很爽利。
我大概能知道作者为什么这么写，一是为了保证篇幅，二就是为了慢慢折磨他们。但实际上没有写出折磨反制的爽感，反而朝着另一个方向滑了过去，那就是因果。
秦淮茹最后冻死桥洞，因为她是上一世造成傻柱冻死的最大推手。
棒梗最终死于自己偷过的井盖儿的下水道中。
大茂因为替傻柱收尸最后有了后。
不过最后十万字的时候作者有些不用心，有几个前后冲突的地方。
整体来说，值得一看。","text_exts":[{"e":16,"s":13,"text":"四合院","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%9B%9B%E5%90%88%E9%99%A2&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774270602619DAAD6%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227543275572141343512%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227367744681284750360%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%9B%9B%E5%90%88%E9%99%A2%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":246,"s":243,"text":"下水道","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%8B%E6%B0%B4%E9%81%93&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774270602619DAAD6%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227543275572141343512%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227367744681284750360%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%8B%E6%B0%B4%E9%81%93%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1756308538,"group_id":"7367744681284750360","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我只想做个混吃等死的米虫啊~","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1eArbuu+Z9dyex52rCF2ehKuk2+sD4GNCfagKjXqCFB","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/fbd28e470d7342e19820aa20f2326828~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793257&x-signature=gDEbkoVl7PShiZmb3OCtM8cPId8%3D","user_id":"1128524589565629","user_name":"魇苍月"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1128524589565629","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1709829184,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"},{"en_title":"author_level_3","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.3","title_id":"author_level_3"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.3","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.3"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7367744681284750360","book_info":{"abstract":"四合院+年代重生+空间（空间影响较小）
风雪桥洞下，何雨柱幡然悔悟，机缘巧合之下，他带着前世的记忆回到了1962年末！
重生之后的何雨柱看着眼前似曾相识的经历，他觉得既然给了自己这个从活一次的机会，那他怎么也得为了自己好好的活一次，而不是为了一个老绝户，还有个吸血寡妇断送自己的未来。
看何雨柱重生之后，如何利用先知先觉，反坑易中海，拿捏小寡妇，娶妻于莉，继而活出一个崭新的人生！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/67ae0d3c1688c0b816ed4e2b2652d160","author":"云霄散人","author_id":"","book_id":"7367744681284750360","book_name":"雪夜惨死，傻柱重生拒当接盘侠","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":495,"name":"四合院","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=495&name=四合院&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7368854337847575065","read_count":"36966","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1192568"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"466","tags":"男频衍生,重生,空间,开局,四合院,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/1304f42b594c98862ab440eb0c631fa1~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779454602&x-signature=3kY5IdnWI3ziRwcgttC0jGvTNSo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"58157822736","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"510"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323205642A2760D454171619DAAD6"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读43小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":153636,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":7223},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1756436989,"author_reply_time":1756437040,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7489613270121038616","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"过分了啊作者！你逮着傻柱一个劲薅羊毛啊[抓狂][抓狂]好不容易连着三天看完了全本，我特么也是手贱点进你的主页，好家伙，总共五本书你三本书都写傻柱，合着你就逮着傻柱一个人薅羊毛！这样好吗？害我又得通宵达旦看完你其余2本！过分了啊铁铁！听话，下次不许这样了[奸笑][奸笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1743815695,"group_id":"7367744681284750360","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2044713623627271"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7367744681284750360","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"329"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读35小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":62771,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":124624,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7489556475328168728","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好书！绝对的爽文！当然前提是你看过电视剧版的情满四合院，再看这本书那真是爽的不要不要的！8.7评分意料之中，可能很多人没看过电视剧版的。看了二十多年小说了现在就爱看点纯粹的爽文，文笔好，剧情设计也很合理，没有过度使用金手指，看了三天一口气看到大结局，还是没有跳章的看，你就看吧，一看一个乐不思蜀，哈哈哈。强烈建议先去看看电视剧情满四合院，再回头看这本书那简直了，爽文，绝对的好书[笑][笑]","text_exts":[{"e":27,"s":22,"text":"情满四合院","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%83%85%E6%BB%A1%E5%9B%9B%E5%90%88%E9%99%A2&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774270602619DAAD6%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227489556475328168728%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227367744681284750360%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%83%85%E6%BB%A1%E5%9B%9B%E5%90%88%E9%99%A2%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1743814710,"group_id":"7367744681284750360","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3z8o7zh+OKJSyOHbbpZ8utjENm879D8t+kPQRnMVmrV","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2e8724b6c0af4903acef0061c6bc4f2e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776797082&x-signature=XWTaO%2Fh1xI51sN1aHS253Z4lzTk%3D","user_id":"2044713623627271","user_name":"无边落木木"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2044713623627271","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7367744681284750360","book_info":{"abstract":"四合院+年代重生+空间（空间影响较小）
